title: cynanchum leucanthum subsp. elongatum
intro: Cynanchum leucanthum subsp. elongatum, also known as the Chinese swallowwort or Asian milkvine, is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cynanchum leucanthum subsp. elongatum include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
